description: Recorded successful Gemini output exercising markdown-fence stripping (gotcha #1) and findings:null→[] normalization (gotcha #3). Adapter parses the wrapped JSON, normalizes findings, and emits canonical envelope.
raw_cli_response_with_quirks:
Here are my findings:

```json
{
  "findings": [
    {
      "finding_id": "performance.fetchProducts.n-plus-one",
      "severity": "medium",

      "title": "fetchProducts triggers N+1 query when accessing relations",
      "description": "The fetchProducts function calls product.related_items inside a forEach loop, generating N+1 database queries.",
      "file": "src/api/products.ts",
      "symbol": "fetchProducts",
      "confidence": "high"
    }
  ]
}
```
post_quirk_normalization_note: Adapter strips ``` markdown fences before JSON.parse (gotcha #1).
